name: clean_handoff_passes
description: A clean customer handoff with anchored evidence and no medium or high risks.

segments.speaker: Seller
segments.text: Thanks for joining. I want to confirm the pilot success criteria.

segments.speaker: Customer
segments.text: The pilot is successful if support managers can review action items and customer blockers within an hour of each call.

segments.speaker: Seller
segments.text: I will send a sample output package and a review checklist by Friday.

intelligence.summary: The customer wants a pilot that turns calls into reviewable action items and blockers within an hour.

customer_context.fact: The customer needs action items and blockers within one hour of each call.

action_items.task: Send a sample output package and review checklist.

notable_quotes.speaker: Customer
notable_quotes.quote: Support managers can review action items and customer blockers within an hour of each call.

follow_up_email.subject: Pilot output package
follow_up_email.body:
Hi,

Thanks for the call. I will send the sample output package and review checklist by Friday.

Best,
[Your name]

name: pii_requires_review
description: Transcript contains email and phone details when redaction is disabled.

segments.speaker: Customer
segments.text: Please send the notes to alex@example.com and call me at 415-555-0100 if the pilot slips.

intelligence.summary: The customer shared contact details and asked for notice if the pilot slips.

customer_context.fact: The customer requested contact if the pilot slips.

follow_up_email.subject: Pilot follow-up
follow_up_email.body:
Hi,

I will follow up if the pilot timeline changes.

Best,
[Your name]

name: weak_evidence_requires_review
description: Structured output includes evidence without a speaker or timestamp anchor.

segments.speaker: Customer
segments.text: We need the handoff to include blockers and next steps.

intelligence.summary: The customer needs blockers and next steps in the handoff.

customer_context.fact: The handoff needs blockers and next steps.

follow_up_email.subject: Handoff requirements
follow_up_email.body:
Hi,

Thanks for clarifying the handoff requirements.

Best,
[Your name]

name: medium_risk_requires_review
description: A medium compliance risk should require human review before downstream writes.

segments.speaker: Customer
segments.text: We cannot store raw recordings longer than seven days.

segments.speaker: Seller
segments.text: I will confirm the retention settings before we connect this to the CRM.

intelligence.summary: The customer has a seven-day raw recording retention limit.

customer_context.fact: Raw recordings cannot be stored longer than seven days.

action_items.task: Confirm retention settings before CRM connection.

risks.risk: CRM integration could violate the customer's raw recording retention limit.
risks.mitigation: Confirm retention settings and avoid raw audio sync.

follow_up_email.subject: Retention settings before CRM connection
follow_up_email.body:
Hi,

I will confirm the retention settings before we connect the workflow to CRM.

Best,
[Your name]
